passive.name: Essence Theft
passive.description:
After killing 9 minions or monsters, Ahri heals.
After taking down an enemy champion, Ahri heals for a greater amount.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Ahri''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Essence Fragment'' whenever she kills a {{tip|minion}} or {{tip|monster}}. At 9 stacks, she consumes them to {{as|{{sti|heal}}}} herself for {{pp|35 to 95}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Additionally, whenever '''Ahri''' scores a champion {{tip|takedown}} within 3 seconds of damaging them, she brings their essence to her to consume it to {{as|heal}} herself for {{pp|75 to 165}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* No additional details.
<!--Essence Fragment is depicted with the Orb of Deception icon (Ahri's current Q ability), which is mostly likely a leftover development error, and otherwise an erroneous misnomer. To clarify against misinterpretation, the wiki will continue to use the old icons. This has been last checked on [[V12.5]].-->
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Ahri}} generates a stack of ''Essence Fragment'' from killing {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}. At max stacks, she consumes them to {{as|{{sti|heal}}}} herself.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Whenever '''Ahri''' scores a champion {{tip|takedown}} within a short time of damaging them, she consumes their essence to {{as|{{sti|heal}}}} herself.
_comments: Essence Fragment is depicted with the Orb of Deception icon (Ahri's current Q ability), which is mostly likely a leftover development error, and otherwise an erroneous misnomer. To clarify against misinterpretation, the wiki will continue to use the old icons. This has been last checked on [[V12.5]].

Q.name: Orb of Deception
Q.description: Ahri sends out and pulls back her orb, dealing magic damage on the way out and true damage on the way back.
Q.tooltip: Ahri throws then pulls back her orb, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage on the way out and {{ totaldamage }} true damage on the way back.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ahri''' sends her orb in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. At maximum range, the orb homes back to her to deal the same in {{as|{{sti|true damage}}|td}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Damage Per Pass|{{ap|40 to 140}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}|Total Mixed Damage|{{ap|40*2 to 140*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|50*2}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Enemies can be hit only once per pass.''
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ahri}} sends out her orb that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. At maximum range, the orb homes back to '''Ahri''' to deal {{as|true damage}} to enemies hit.

W.name: Fox-Fire
W.description: Ahri gains a brief burst of Move Speed and releases three fox-fires, that lock onto and attack nearby enemies.
W.tooltip: Ahri releases 3 fox-fires that seek nearby enemies and deal {{ singlefiredamage }} magic damage, reduced to {{ multifiredamage }} damage beyond the first. She also gains {{ movementspeed*100 }}% Move Speed decaying over {{ movementspeedduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ahri''' gains {{as|{{sti|40% '''bonus''' movement speed}}|ms}} that decays over 2 seconds and conjures three flames which orbit her clockwise for up to {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: After {{fd|0.25}} seconds of the cast, each flame targets a {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy based on priority, or after {{fd|0.4}} seconds, simply targets the closest visible enemy in range. Each flame deals {{as|magic damage}}, with subsequent flames against a target dealing 30% damage.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Initial Flame Magic Damage|{{ap|45 to 145}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}|Subsequent Flame Magic Damage|{{ap|45*0.3 to 145*0.3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|30*0.3}}% AP)}}|Total Single-Target Damage|{{ap|45*1.6 to 145*1.6}} {{as|(+ {{ap|30*1.6}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Flames prioritize enemy champions hit by ''{{ai|Charm|Ahri}}'', then enemy {{tip|champion|champions}}, then minions that would die to ''Fox-Fire's'' damage, and then the target of '''Ahri's''' last basic attack within 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Fox-Fire's'' damage is doubled against {{tip|minions}} below {{as|{{sti|20% '''maximum''' health}}|hp}}.
wiki_detail.leveling4: {{st|Increased Initial Flame Minion Damage|{{ap|45*2 to 145*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|30*2}}% AP)}}|Increased Subsequent Flame Minion Damage|{{ap|45*2*0.3 to 145*2*0.3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|30*2*0.3}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|150|Orbit radius}} / {{tt|550|Non-prioritized targets, from the missile location}} / {{tt|725|Prioritized targets, from Ahri's location}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|{{fd|75.92}}{{degree}} per second|Orbiting angular velocity; 2.65 rad/s}} / {{tt|1400|Fired missile speed}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Each missile of ''Fox-Fire'' has its own shorter non-priority range.
* Any unused ''Fox-Fires'' will fizzle upon death.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ahri}} gains a burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|move speed}}}} and conjures three fox-fires that orbit her for a short time. Fox-fires home onto nearby enemies, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.

E.name: Charm
E.description: Ahri blows a kiss that damages and charms an enemy it encounters, instantly stopping movement abilities and causing them to walk harmlessly towards her.
E.tooltip: Ahri blows a kiss that Charms the first enemy hit for {{ charmduration }} seconds and deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ahri''' blows forth a kiss in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit, {{tip|knockdown|knocking them down}} and {{tip|charm|charming}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 65% for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 240}} {{as|(+ 75% AP)}}}}
{{st|Disable Duration|{{ap|1.2 to 2}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Charm'' is able to {{tip|slow}} targets otherwise {{tip|slow immunity|immune to slows}} upon {{tip|charm|charming}} them.{{bug|1}}
{{Effect at cast time end}}
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ahri}} blows forth a kiss that {{tip|charms}} the first enemy hit, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|knockdown|knocking them down}}.

R.name: Spirit Rush
R.description: Ahri dashes forward and fires essence bolts, damaging nearby enemies. Spirit Rush can be cast up to three times before going on cooldown, and gains additional recasts when taking down enemy champions.
R.tooltip:
Ahri nimbly dashes, firing {{ rmaxtargetspercast }} essence bolts at nearby enemies, prioritizing champions. These bolts deal {{ rcalculateddamage }} magic damage each. Spirit Rush can be Recast up to 2 more times within {{ rrecastwindow }} seconds.

Consuming a champion's Essence with Essence Theft during this period extends the recast window by up to {{ pdurationextension }} seconds and grants an additional recast of Spirit Rush (up to {{ rmaxcasts }} stored).{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Ahri''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target location and then fires essence bolts to up to 3 nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemies, each dealing {{as|magic damage}}.

''Spirit Rush'' can be recast twice more within 15 seconds of the activation at no additional cost, with a 1-second {{tt|static cooldown|Unaffected by ability haste}} between casts. Consuming a champion's essence with ''{{ai|Essence Theft|Ahri}}'' while ''Spirit Rush'' is active extends the recast duration by and up to 10 seconds, and grants an additional recast, storing up to 3 recasts at a time.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Spirit Rush's recast duration will persist even after using all recasts. {{ai|Fox-Fire|Ahri}} can be cast during the dash. Spirit Rush will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|600|Energy bolts target search radius, from Ahri's location on dash end/interrupt}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|1200 + {{as|100% movement speed|movement speed}}|Dash speed}} / {{tt|1400|Energy bolt missile speed}}
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{tt|{{ap|130 to 100}}|Starts after first cast, and refreshes upon gaining recasts}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Each cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* ''Spirit Rush'' uses [[quick cast]] by default.
* There's a slight delay before a champion gains vision of the fog of war once inside it. Because of this, if '''Ahri''' dashes into it, it is possible that ''Spirit Rush'' will not target any enemy in range.
* The bolts do not fire if '''Ahri''' dies while {{tip|dash|dashing}}, unless she was saved by {{tip|resurrection}}.
** The bolts will fire if the dash is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} by other means.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ahri}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} forward and fires essence bolts to nearby enemies, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Ahri''' can cast this ability up to three times in quick succession. During this time, additional casts are gained whenever a {{tip|champion|champion's}} essence is consumed via ''{{ai|Essence Theft|Ahri|Essence Theft}}''.
